Event: Royal Challenge - Season 19
Event Date: 01/11/2023
Sage Bot Item Code: RI101
Mineral Retainer Ring

When attacking, the unit has a 40% chance to fire a missile at a random enemy. The missile deals 150000 magic damage and blinds the target for 3 sec. Blinded enemies have a 35% chance of missing their target when attacking.

Requirements: 98-100
